redGuard.focusedCommand: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm exec vitest run src/renderer/components/common/Avatar.test.tsx src/renderer/components/common/overlay-focus.test.tsx src/renderer/Sidebar.test.tsx src/renderer/components/session/ThreadHistoryDrawer.test.tsx
failureSummary: The focused overlay helper contract was missing: overlay-focus.ts did not export a scoped close-time blur helper, so the new helper-level test failed immediately.
Sidebar and ThreadHistoryDrawer close paths did not release focus before hiding their subtree, so the new shell hygiene tests observed no focus-release call on close.
The new Avatar regression test also needed the standard Mantine matchMedia stub before it could exercise the actual sessionType prop leak in jsdom.

greenGuard.focusedCommand: source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 >/dev/null && pnpm exec vitest run src/renderer/components/chat/Message.chatbridge.test.tsx src/renderer/components/common/Avatar.test.tsx src/renderer/components/common/overlay-focus.test.tsx src/renderer/Sidebar.test.tsx src/renderer/components/session/ThreadHistoryDrawer.test.tsx
